name: The Pawn Broker
short_description: The Pawn Broker is an atmospheric horror economic survival game. Run a cursed pawnshop, analyze every item that comes through for signs of theft or dark curses, and make high-stakes decisions to stay profitable before your five days are up.

name: The Incident
short_description: The Incident is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore a closed circus, destroy evidence before investigators arrive, and avoid someone still inside watching your every move.

name: Hot Dogs, Horseshoes & Hand Grenades
short_description: Do you like hot dogs? How about horseshoes? Hand grenades? (everyone likes hand grenades) Anyway, we've got all that, and guns. SO MANY GUNS. So if you like ordnance, meat, and far too many groan-worthy puns, this is the VR sandbox game for you.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: FOCUS
short_description: Surveillance footage is slowly being rewritten. A point-and-click observation horror game where you find what changed and report it.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Master Fall
short_description: Master Fall is a 2D psychological horror puzzle-platformer where players rotate the world to manipulate gravity, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden secrets as reality slowly collapses into a surreal nightmare.

name: Spirit of the Dome
short_description: Defend against endless waves of enemies and dark forces across a decaying world in this RTS styled tower defense game!

name: For the Crown
short_description: A puzzle logistics builder where lemming-like workers transport resources across a limited island. Create production chains, optimize routes, upgrade your castle and solve increasingly complex space and logistics challenges. The island never gets bigger. Your logistics problems do.

name: SoundRelay
short_description: A simple desktop soundboard that lets you play audio clips directly through your microphone in any game or voice chat. Instantly expand your collection of audio clips with full Steam Workshop and Linux support. Perfect for streamers or trolling your friends!

name: An Adventure in Arabic
short_description: An Adventure in Arabic is a series of games that teaches Arabic Language. Chapter One, introduces Arabic Alphabet. Learn the various shapes and pronunciation of each letter while enjoying playing an Adventure RPG. The game has something to offer for all ages, feature rich and full of activities.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10

name: Random Fantasy Defense
short_description: A Tower Defense with Roguelike factor where divine blessings are unpredictable. Build your army, adapt to random fortunes, and defend Mystologia from an encroaching darkness.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10

name: Syndeo-Complex
short_description: In Syndeo-Complex you will explore five different environments connected by a hub. Each level has its own mechanics, weapons, enemies and bosses. The Keli, small droids, will (probably) guide you in your quest.

name: JULPAE
short_description: JULPAE is a free-to-play 4-player online card battle game with a Korean-inspired atmosphere. Learn the flow quickly in 1v1 duels, then infer hidden teams, play or pass, and read the match through timing, decisions, and mind games.

name: Sex Passion and Lust
short_description: Sex Passion and Lust is the ultimate adult open-world sandbox game where your deepest fantasies come to life. Indulge in fully animated, uncensored sex scenes (solo, partner, and group), deep character customization, and complete cinematic control. No filters. No limits. Just pure, raw freedom.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Overlab
short_description: Combine atoms to create molecules and fulfill orders to survive as long as possible.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Visionaire Studio
short_description: Visionaire Studio is a professional game engine designed specifically for the creation of 2D and point-and-click adventure games.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Where Is Mommy
short_description: Trapped in a bazaar that twists with every turn, you are a lost child searching for your mother. Watch for subtle anomalies in the shifting environment to survive the loop. In this retro-inspired world, nothing is as it seems. Can you find her before the cycle swallows you whole?

name: Wizard Gold
short_description: An incremental game about an ancient stone that turns wood into gold. You collect fallen wood and feed it to the stone for gold, then hire wizards, buy upgrades, and cast spells. Prestige to start once again with permanent power to help you feed the stone even more.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: The King's Game: Through the Veil
short_description: The King's Game is a 3D chess game where the pieces are concealed from your opponent. with two game modes; standard two-player chess and a circular board three-player chess variant. All across multiple atmospheric 3D environments.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: TravelRoute Studio
short_description: Don't leave your journey as just a GPS track. TravelRoute Studio turns GPX files into dynamic map videos for travelers. Features multiple camera modes, custom tags, and 1080p MP4 export. Create stunning route animations for YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok in minutes to share your story!

name: Nin Ninja RESCUE MISSION
short_description: Nin Ninja Rescue Mission is an action, adventure, platform, and endless runner game. Run, face dangerous enemies, dodge traps, defeat enemies, and use your skills to complete a rescue mission.

name: Incarnation - Lifetimes
short_description: After years of development, many failures and redesigns, Incarnation - Lifetimes final form is taking shape.

name: Pickel: The Mysterious Mine
short_description: A mysterious earthquake strikes, and the townspeople vanish without a trace. Become 'Pico' and venture deep into a dark underworld. Discover strange clues with every strike of your pickaxe. As you descend, a buried truth surfaces. What awaits at the bottom of the mine?

name: Yips!
short_description: Throw the ball, chase it, and climb higher. Yips! is a pixel-art precision platformer where you must overcome unpredictable innings using a single baseball and carefully aimed throws.

name: City Cardz
short_description: Collect 1200+ city cards from 600+ different cities, build your deck and compete in strategic card battles inspired by cities from around the world. Discover unique card abilities, different combinations, and interesting city facts as you outsmart the opponents.

name: 五行策(WuXing Card)
short_description: WuXing is a strategic card game inspired by the Five Elements of Chinese philosophy. Build powerful combos by mixing hero abilities and items, chase high scores, and adapt to ever-changing battles to forge your own winning strategy

name: Rootbound Enigma
short_description: Rootbound Enigma is a first-person puzzle adventure where curiosity leads to treasure, and mistakes lead to danger. Solve puzzles, overcome traps and parkour challenges, and explore atmospheric underground ruins.

name: Brick Game
short_description: A retro-inspired classic arcade brick-breaker

name: Relic Restorer
short_description: In this 2D puzzle game, you play as a cultural relic restorer tasked with mending broken cultural relics.

name: Grandpa's Euchre
short_description: Grandpa's Euchre - Rule #1: NO TABLE TALK!!!!!! This is the card game version of Euchre that my Grandpa taught me. I grew up in Illinois and we played this at every family gathering.

name: Last Guest at Sunset
short_description: Investigate a replayable Hollywood murder mystery where everyone has something to hide. Question guests, uncover contradictions, and identify the killer before they escape justice.
